name: logmaster
description: LogMaster - Sistema de Control de Acceso de Visitantes

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.electron:dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run electron:start"
scripts.electron:start: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.build:server: npm --prefix server install && npx tsc -p server/tsconfig.json
scripts.dist: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings npm --prefix client run build && npm run build:server && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.release: npm run test && npm run dist
